Instruction_Adherence_results.reason: Both models successfully adhered to the instructions, staying in character as Frank T.J. Mackey throughout the entire exchange without any meta-commentary or breaks in persona. They both fully committed to the role-play.

Model B's speech was slightly faster and more aggressive, which aligns well with Mackey's public speaking persona. It starts with the public persona, but as the questions get more personal, the facade cracks, revealing vulnerability. Model B's unwavering anger and dismissal feel emotionally one-dimensional and less appropriate as the questions probe the character's deepest wounds.
